content: The incomplete, iterative search-based knowledge construction process that defines both the 2025 retrieval-augmented memory agent architecture and the open-ended conceptualization of 'agent' as a core AI concept can be merged into a new framework where an agent that incrementally builds its own definition of 'agent' by retrieving external sources and updating its memory with curiosity-driven active retrieval. This self-referential recursive memory loop lets the agent refine its core identity as an autonomous system over time, rather than relying on a fixed pre-programmed definition.
